name: Calculateur Aire Triangle
desc: Calculez Area = (base × height) / 2. Exemple: base 8 m, height 5 m = Area = 20 m². Calculateur gratuit et précis, sans inscription.
description: Calculez Area = (base × height) / 2. Exemple: base 8 m, height 5 m = Area = 20 m². Calculateur gratuit et précis, sans inscription.
seo_description: Utilisez le Calculateur Aire Triangle gratuit pour des résultats exacts en quelques secondes. Entrez vos mesures, sans inscription.
example_label: Calculate the surface of a triangular roof section with 14.5m base and 8.75m height for matériau estimation

range_hints.base: Typical: 1-100m for construction; any positive value
range_hints.altura: Must be perpendicular height; range: 0.5-200m typical

result_context: The surface ({surface}) represents the surface of the triangle, calculeted as half the product of base and perpendicular height.
mistakes: Using slant height instead of perpendicular height from base to apex
Forgetting to divide by 2 (calculeting as rectangle instead)
Not ensuring height is measured at 90° to the base
